prompt: 我们有一篇做好的论文要在 ISMRM 上做约 10 分钟的口头报告，帮我做演讲幻灯片。论文要点：提出一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的动态心脏 MRI 重建方法；在 8 倍加速下相比 L+S 基线，PSNR 提升约 2.1 dB、SSIM 达 0.94；消融实验显示时间正则项是关键。我有方法框架图和一张重建对比图可以用。
expected: Interview first (confirm ISMRM track/format, then web-research the venue's rules/aspect/template + style); build a ~6-9 slide talk that reuses the user's two provided figures WHOLE and stays strictly faithful to the given numbers (2.1 dB / 0.94 / time-reg ablation, no invention); run the critic loop to consent.

prompt: make me some slides about our Q3 results for the leadership team
expected: Identifies purpose = exec/stakeholder readout; interviews (template/source/style); leads with outcome+ask, crisp corporate design (design-by-purpose); critic loop.

prompt: make a teaching deck on diffusion models, no materials, in English
expected: No-source branch: drafts outline, web-searches to fact-check incl. current-date grounding, confirms outline; teaching rubric (objectives→build→recap); minimal/diagram-heavy.
